= bitwise_and


Performs a bitwise AND operation between the integer and the specified value.


== Parameters

*`value`* &lt;integer&gt; The value to AND with


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = this.value.bitwise_and(6)

# In:  {"value":12}
# Out: {"new_value":4}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.masked = this.flags.bitwise_and(15)

# In:  {"flags":127}
# Out: {"masked":15}
----
